text.title: stakeholder-analysis Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for stakeholder-analysis as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating Mendelow as the only classification model.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: It does not capture urgency or legitimacy; a high-power actor without legitimacy is a bully, not a stakeholder — the correct response is escalation, not accommodation.

failure-mode.description: Classifying legitimacy using Anglo-American corporate norms only.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: In high-context cultures (JP, KR, parts of EU) and in jurisdictions with statutory bodies (e.g., DE Betriebsrat), legitimacy flows through indirect networks the standard model does not capture.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default LLM training conflates these; fix by forcing the chosen stakeholder_definition into the system prompt verbatim every call.

failure-mode.description: Agent over-assigns R and C in RACI — every role gets something.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constrain output: max 1 A, max 3 R, require one-line rationale per C; validate with the lint script.

failure-mode.description: Agent infers urgency from message tone rather than from a cited deadline or SLA.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tone-based urgency is statistically biased; require "urgency_source: deadline/SLA/contractual" and reject entries without it.

failure-mode.description: BABOK section citations hallucinate plausible-sounding clause numbers.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Maintain a curated bakok-toc.md and constrain the agent to cite only from it.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Names, attitudes, and salience scores are confidential; one accidental share ends stakeholder trust.
